query: Is there a calendar year limit for eye exams?
answer:
The Vision Exam benefit does not have a calendar year limit.

| Benefit | Service | In-Network | Out-of-Network | Limitations |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Vision Exams | Vision Exams | No charge | 40% of the Allowed Amount | Calendar year limit: one complete exam. |

| Topic | Coverage Information |
| :--- | :--- |
| Vision Exams | Covered routine exam services include: • Examination of the outer and inner parts of the eye • Evaluation of vision sharpness (refraction) • Binocular balance testing • Routine tests of color vision, peripheral vision and intraocular pressure • Case history and recommendations The Vision Exam benefit doesn’t cover: • Vision hardware or fitting examinations for contact lenses or eyeglasses. • Routine examinations in connection with employment 3 |
